name: Raggmunk (Swedish Potatoe Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the flour and salt with half of the milk.
2. Add the egg and the remaining milk to the mixture.
3. Grate the potatoes and add them to the batter.
4. Stir until combined.
5. Melt the oil or margarine in a frying pan.
6. Place a thin layer of the mixture into the hot pan.
7. Cook until lightly browned, then flip and cook the other side.
8. Serve with unsweetened lingonberry jam and vegetables. Carrots can be substituted for some of the potatoes.
9. This is a Weight Watchers recipe.
